title: Hicorius × laneyi
taxonomy: Hicorius × laneyi is classified as a hybrid species, specifically a cross between the Hickory species, Pseudotsuga spp. and the American Chestnut, Castanea dentata. As a result, its classification is often debated among botanists. The species is often considered a member of the Betulaceae or Fagaceae family, depending on the source. However, the exact classification of Hicorius × laneyi remains somewhat ambiguous. Further research is needed to clarify its taxonomic status.
